# Overlapping clips — script should auto-adjust start times
# Clip B starts before Clip A ends (overlap by 30s)
# Clip C is fully contained within Clip B after adjustment (should be skipped)
# start-timestamp, end-timestamp, video-name
0:10,1:00,Clip A
0:45,1:30,Clip B Overlaps A
0:50,0:55,Clip C Swallowed By B
1:35,2:00,Clip D Clean
